headline: General Dynamics (GD) Stock After Strong Multi‑Year Run Are Recent Gains Justified By Cash Flows
summary: If you are wondering whether General Dynamics at around US$360 a share offers fair value or is pricing in too much optimism, the key is to look past the headline moves and focus on what the numbers are actually saying about the stock. The stock has recently recorded returns of 4.0% over 7 days, 5.5% over 30 days, 4.9% year to date, 29.6% over 1 year, 76.2% over 3 years, and 116.5% over 5 years. This performance has put valuation front of mind for many investors who are weighing growth...
